overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring depicting a cloaked character traversing a stormy flooded graveyard and entering the Darklight Catacombs. The clip transitions from a rain-soaked outdoor ruin environment to the candlelit stone corridors of an underground dungeon, showcasing detailed gothic architecture and atmospheric lighting.

events.description: character exits stone archway into open flooded wetlands
lightning flashes illuminate the distant storm clouds

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily through shallow water, moving away from the ruins toward the distant entrance

entered.detail: large stone archway framing the exit from the ruins
weathered stone walls with moss and decay
luminescent orange flora growing along the ruin walls
shallow water covering the ground with tombstones visible
ancient grave markers protruding from the water

segments.scene_description: The character begins in ancient stone ruins and exits through a large archway into a stormy flooded graveyard. Rain falls heavily as lightning flashes in the distance, illuminating the shallow waters and scattered tombstones. The character wades through the water toward a dark stone entrance visible in the far distance.

events.description: character approaches the dark stone entrance portal of the catacombs
interior candlelight becomes visible as character enters the Darklight Catacombs

agents.ego_description: character walks out of the flooded area and enters the stone doorway, transitioning from outdoor rain to the dark interior

entered.detail: dark stone doorway leading into the underground structure
stone steps ascending into the darkness
flickering candles mounted on the interior walls

segments.scene_description: Leaving the open floodwaters behind, the character approaches and enters a dark stone portal. The environment shifts from exposed stormy weather to a sheltered stone entrance. As the character steps inside, the screen displays 'Darklight Catacombs' and the lighting transitions to flickering candlelight illuminating the stone stairs ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground catacomb corridors with skeletal remains

events.description: character enters a large vaulted room with stone columns and arches
character begins ascending an interior stone staircase

agents.ego_description: character navigates through the candlelit corridors, passing skeletal remains and stone pillars while moving deeper into the catacombs

entered.detail: arched stone ceiling with detailed masonry
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the ceiling
stone archways leading to side chambers
wall-mounted candle holders providing dim illumination
bones and remains littering the stone floor

segments.scene_description: Inside the Darklight Catacombs, the character explores dimly lit stone corridors with vaulted ceilings and massive support columns. Skeletal remains litter the floor, and wall sconces cast flickering shadows. The character moves through arched doorways and begins ascending a stone staircase leading to upper levels.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand upper hall with massive sculpture

events.description: character enters a large upper hall with ornate railings and tall pillars
massive stone head sculpture becomes prominently visible in the center of the hall

agents.ego_description: character climbs the grand staircase and explores the upper balcony, approaching a massive stone head sculpture

entered.detail: wide stone stairs leading to the upper level
ornate carved stone railings along the balcony edge
giant sculptural head with detailed features dominating the hall
monolithic columns supporting the upper structure

segments.scene_description: Ascending to the upper level, the character enters a grand hall with ornate stone railings and towering pillars. The space opens up to reveal a massive stone head sculpture dominating the center of the chamber. The character walks along the broken marble tiles of the balcony, approaching the giant sculpture while wall lanterns cast dramatic shadows across the ancient stonework.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-lashed outdoor graveyard into the oppressive, candlelit depths of an ancient underground complex. It begins within stone ruins, moving through a large archway into a stormy flooded graveyard where lightning flashes over shallow waters and scattered tombstones. As the character wades toward a distant portal, the environment shifts from the exposed elements to a sheltered stone entrance, where the lighting transitions from gray storm clouds to the flickering glow of candlelight. The scene then expands into the Darklight Catacombs, gliding through dimly lit corridors with vaulted ceilings and skeletal remains before ascending a stone staircase. Finally, the camera emerges into a grand hall of ornate railings and towering pillars, moving across broken marble tiles toward a massive stone head sculpture that dominates the chamber.
